# Non-Functional Requirement Contracts

<!-- Generated by forgecraft. Update with project-specific values. -->
<!-- Each entry is a measurable assertion, not an aspiration. -->

## Performance Contracts

| Operation | P50 | P99 | Max | RPS | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `setup_project` (phase 1) | ≤ 500ms | ≤ 2000ms | ≤ 5000ms | 10 | File I/O bound |
| `audit` | ≤ 1000ms | ≤ 3000ms | ≤ 8000ms | 5 | Scales with project size |
| `layer_status` | ≤ 200ms | ≤ 500ms | ≤ 1000ms | 50 | Read-only, no I/O |
| `consolidate_status` | ≤ 300ms | ≤ 800ms | ≤ 2000ms | 20 | Git log + file reads |

## Availability Contracts
- MCP server startup: ≤ 2000ms cold start
- No single operation blocks > 10000ms (hard timeout)
- All operations are stateless and re-entrant

## Correctness Contracts
- `check_cascade`: deterministic — same input → same PASS/FAIL across runs
- `layer_status`: monotonic — adding probe files never reduces L2 coverage
- `audit`: idempotent — running twice on same project returns same score

## Hardening Thresholds
- Mutation score: ≥ 80% on changed code (≥ 70% overall)
- Test coverage: ≥ 80% line coverage
- Zero HIGH/CRITICAL CVEs in npm audit
